title: fix: use org-boss app token for docs regeneration workflow
author: ElliotEtag

gist.headline: Bossing the docs
gist.blurb: Fixed a hiccup in our automated docs regeneration workflow by giving it the right permissions. The org-boss app is now handling the paperwork.
gist.summary: Updated the API documentation regeneration GitHub workflow to authenticate using the org-boss app token.
gist.impact: Automated API documentation updates will now successfully create pull requests again without permission errors.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about GitHub Actions, automation, and a 'boss' app handling paperwork/docs. Visuals: The bee mascot (Polly) handing a stack of papers (docs) to a robot (automation/org-boss) who is stamping them.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a stack of paper documents to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head who is stamping them with a green checkmark. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a stack of paper documents to a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head who is stamping them with a green checkmark.
